name: IRS Consent to Discharge of Lien

eligibility.description: Taxpayers seeking to sell property encumbered by a federal tax lien to satisfy other obligations or clear title.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a mechanism to sell property free and clear of a federal tax lien if the Secretary consents to the sale, even if standard notice requirements aren't met.
